charmanApiUrl.name: Charman API URL
charmanApiUrl.hint: The base URL for your Charman character management API (e.g., https://charman.example.com). Leave empty to disable Charman integration.

charmanApiPath.name: Charman API Path
charmanApiPath.hint: The API path prefix for your Charman API endpoints (e.g., /charman/api/foundry or /myextension/api/foundry). Default is /charman/api/foundry.

charmanApiKey.name: Charman API Key
charmanApiKey.hint: Optional API key for authenticating with your Charman API. Leave empty if your API doesn't require authentication.

criticalBotchTable.name: Critical Botch Table
criticalBotchTable.hint: When a character rolls a botch (5 or below), roll on this table for additional effects. The table should have results on a 1d100. For example: 01-20 = Minor Setback, 21-40 = Major Setback, 41-60 = Temporary Injury, 61-80 = Severe Injury, 81-95 = Catastrophic Injury, 96-100 = Death.

criticalSuccessTable.name: Critical Success Table
criticalSuccessTable.hint: When a character rolls a critical success (6s equal to or exceeding their rank), roll on this table for additional effects. The table should have results on a 1d100. For example: 01-20 = Minor Benefit, 21-40 = Major Benefit, 41-60 = Temporary Advantage, 61-80 = Significant Advantage, 81-95 = Exceptional Advantage, 96-100 = Extraordinary Advantage.

mpEnabled.name: Enable Mental Points (MP) System
mpEnabled.hint: Enable the houserule Mental Points system. When enabled, characters gain MP equal to their RIP (Reasoning + Intuition + Psyche) attributes. Powers can then have MP costs.

armorEnabled.name: Enable Armor / Equipment System
armorEnabled.hint: Enable the houserule Armor system. When enabled, an Armor tab appears on each character sheet where armor of a given rank can be equipped. Equipped armor reduces incoming physical damage.

degradingArmor.name: Armor Degradation Mode
degradingArmor.hint: How armor degrades when taking damage (requires Armor system). None: Armor soaks but never degrades. Full: Armor reduced by damage soaked (40 armor soaks 30 = 10 remaining). Per-Hit: Armor reduced by 1 per hit that penetrates (30 armor, 35 damage = 5 through, armor becomes 29).

vulnerabilityPowers.name: Enable Vulnerability Powers
vulnerabilityPowers.hint: When enabled, powers with a vulnerabilityType set will increase incoming damage of that type. The percentage increase is configured in the 'Vulnerability Damage Increase' setting below.

vulnerabilityDamageIncrease.name: Vulnerability Damage Increase (%)
vulnerabilityDamageIncrease.hint: Percentage increase to incoming damage when a character has a matching vulnerability power. Default is 25% (representing 1 CS weaker defense). Example: 25% means a character with 'Vulnerability: Fire' takes 25% more damage from fire attacks.

weaponsEnabled.name: Enable Weapons System
weaponsEnabled.hint: Enable the houserule Weapons system. When enabled, characters can have weapons with damage values, type (ranged/melee), stat bonuses for to-hit rolls, and references to applicable talents. Ranged weapons use Agility, melee weapons use Fighting.

lockPlayerStats.name: Lock Player Stat Editing
lockPlayerStats.hint: When enabled, prevents players from editing character form attributes (Fighting, Agility, Strength, etc.) on their sheets. Only GMs can edit stats, but players can still sync from Charman and edit equipment/armor.

healthCalculationMethod.name: Health Calculation Method
healthCalculationMethod.hint: Choose how character health is calculated: FASE Sum (F+A+S+E, default) or Endurance × 2 (classic rule). Changing this will recalculate health for all characters.
